name: Energos API
description: Support: support@energos.ai | Website: https://www.energos.ai Welcome to the Energos API reference. Use these endpoints to read and manage operational data such as Work Orders, Requests, Assets, Meters, and more. Getting Started: In the Energos web app navigate to Settings → Organization Settings, click on Integrations tab, then click “+ New Key” to create a REST API key you can supply as a bearer token. Need something that is not documented yet? Drop us a note at support@energos.ai — your feedback helps shape the roadmap.
